---
title: "Figure 5A-D. Valerylcarnitine serves as a central biomarker of mammary gland function and infant growth, and may be causally linked to low levels of Pantothenic Acid"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Show code if file is knit 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Sets working directory to file location
library(rstudioapi)
if (interactive() && rstudioapi::isAvailable()) { 
  rootdir = dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path) 
  setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)) 
}
```

# Load data, libraries, functions
``` {r}
# Load libraries and data 
source("plotting_setup.R")
# Load functions
source("plotting_functions.R")
```

## Figure 5A
``` {r}
C3_color = "lightblue"
C4_color = "lightgreen"
C5_color = "orange"

# Plotting each subgraph depicting the association between acylcarnitine percentile values and WAZ outcome
grid_C5_A1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C5_B1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C5_C1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
  
grid_C5_D1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C5_E1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
  
grid_C5_F1 = Child_everything %>% 
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = WAZ_M03)) + geom_boxplot(fill = "grey") + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,5) + ylab(NULL) +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")



grid_C4_A1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C4_percentile = cut(C4, 
                               breaks = quantile(C4, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(C4), C4_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C4_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C4_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C4_B1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C4_percentile = cut(C4, 
                               breaks = quantile(C4, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C4), C4_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C4_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C4_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C4_C1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>%
    mutate(C4_percentile = cut(C4, 
                               breaks = quantile(C4, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C4), C4_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C4_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C4_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
  
grid_C4_D1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C4_percentile = cut(C4, 
                               breaks = quantile(C4, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C4), C4_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C4_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C4_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C4_E1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C4_percentile = cut(C4, 
                               breaks = quantile(C4, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C4), C4_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C4_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C4_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
  
grid_C4_F1 = Child_everything %>% 
    mutate(C4_percentile = cut(C4, 
                               breaks = quantile(C4, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C4), C4_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C4_percentile, y = WAZ_M03)) + geom_boxplot(fill = "grey") + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,5) +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("") + ylab(NULL)


grid_C3_A1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C3_percentile = cut(C3, 
                               breaks = quantile(C3, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(C3), C3_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C3_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C3_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")#+ ggtitle("Misame: 14-21D")
grid_C3_B1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C3_percentile = cut(C3, 
                               breaks = quantile(C3, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C3), C3_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C3_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C3_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3)  + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")#+ ggtitle("Misame: 1-2M")
grid_C3_C1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>%
    mutate(C3_percentile = cut(C3, 
                               breaks = quantile(C3, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C3), C3_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C3_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C3_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3)  + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")#+ ggtitle("Misame: 3-4M")
  
grid_C3_D1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C3_percentile = cut(C3, 
                               breaks = quantile(C3, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C3), C3_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C3_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C3_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")#+ ggtitle("Vital: 40D")
grid_C3_E1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C3_percentile = cut(C3, 
                               breaks = quantile(C3, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C3), C3_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C3_percentile, y = WAZ_M04)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C3_color) + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,3)+ theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")#+ ggtitle("Vital: 56D")
  
grid_C3_F1 = Child_everything %>% 
    mutate(C3_percentile = cut(C3, 
                               breaks = quantile(C3, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C3), C3_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C3_percentile, y = WAZ_M03)) + geom_boxplot(fill = "grey") + theme_minimal() + ylim(-5,5) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")#+ ggtitle("Child: 3M")

# Arranging subgraphs as a grid
Figure5A = ggarrange(
  ggarrange(grid_C3_A1, grid_C3_B1, grid_C3_C1, grid_C3_D1, grid_C3_E1, grid_C3_F1, ncol = 1),
  ggarrange(grid_C4_A1, grid_C4_B1, grid_C4_C1, grid_C4_D1, grid_C4_E1, grid_C4_F1, ncol = 1),
  ggarrange(grid_C5_A1, grid_C5_B1, grid_C5_C1, grid_C5_D1, grid_C5_E1, grid_C5_F1, ncol = 1),
  nrow = 1)
Figure5A

ggexport(Figure5A, filename=paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5A.pdf"),
         width=750, height=450, dpi=300)
ggexport(Figure5A, filename=paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5A.pdf"),
         width=8, height=16, dpi=300)

10*(750/450)
```


## Figure 5B: Effect of BEP on C5 levels (box-plot)
``` {r}
Figure5B = ggarrange(
  Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>% 
    mutate(Postnatal_BEP=factor(ifelse(Postnatal_BEP==TRUE, "Yes", "No"), c("Yes", "No"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=Postnatal_BEP, y=C5, fill=Postnatal_BEP)) + geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Yes", "No")), 
                       method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif") +
    ggtitle("MISAME") + xlab("Postnatal BEP") + theme_minimal(),
  Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(Postnatal_BEP=factor(ifelse(Postnatal_BEP==TRUE, "Yes", "No"), c("Yes", "No"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=Postnatal_BEP, y=C5, fill=Postnatal_BEP)) + geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Yes", "No")), 
                       method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif") +
    ggtitle("") + xlab("Postnatal BEP") + theme_minimal(),
  Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>%
    mutate(Postnatal_BEP=factor(ifelse(Postnatal_BEP==TRUE, "Yes", "No"), c("Yes", "No"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=Postnatal_BEP, y=C5, fill=Postnatal_BEP)) + geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Yes", "No")), 
                       method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif") +
    ggtitle("") + xlab("Postnatal BEP") + theme_minimal(),
  Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(Postnatal_BEP=factor(ifelse(Postnatal_BEP==TRUE, "Yes", "No"), c("Yes", "No"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=Postnatal_BEP, y=C5, fill=Postnatal_BEP)) + geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Yes", "No")), 
                       method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif") +
    ggtitle("Mumta-LW") + xlab("Postnatal BEP") + theme_minimal(),
  Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(Postnatal_BEP=factor(ifelse(Postnatal_BEP==TRUE, "Yes", "No"), c("Yes", "No"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=Postnatal_BEP, y=C5, fill=Postnatal_BEP)) + geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) + facet_grid(.~Timepoint) + 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Yes", "No")), 
                       method = "wilcox", label = "p.signif") +
    ggtitle("") + xlab("Postnatal BEP") + theme_minimal(),
  nrow=1)

Figure5B
ggexport(Figure5B, filename=paste0(fig_path, "/Figure5B.pdf"),
         width=7.3, height=4)
```
## Figure 5C: Pantothenic acid distributions per study
``` {r}
Misame_everything %>% filter(!is.na(Timepoint)) %>% dplyr::select(Timepoint, TP_label, PA, BEP) %>%
  mutate(PA_threshold1 = case_when(Timepoint==1 ~ 11.57,
                                   Timepoint==2 ~ 11.69,
                                   Timepoint==3 ~ 10.89),
         PA_threshold2 = case_when(Timepoint==1 ~ 10.93,
                                   TRUE ~ NA)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PA, color = as.factor(BEP))) + 
            geom_density(size=1) + ggtitle("MISAME") + xlab("Pantothenic Acid (uM)") + ylab("Density") + theme_minimal() +
            geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PA_threshold1), linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 1) + 
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = PA_threshold2), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", size = 1) +
  facet_grid(TP_label~.)
  
Figure5C = ggarrange(Misame_everything %>% filter(!is.na(Timepoint)) %>% ggplot(aes(x=PA, color = as.factor(BEP))) + 
            geom_density(size=1) + ggtitle("MISAME") + xlab("Pantothenic Acid (uM)") + ylab("Density") + theme_minimal() +
            geom_vline(xintercept = 10.95, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 1) + facet_grid(TP_label~.),
Vital_everything %>% filter(!is.na(Timepoint)) %>% ggplot(aes(x=PA, color = as.factor(BEP))) + 
              geom_density(size=1) + ggtitle("Mumta-LW") + xlab("Pantothenic Acid (uM)") + ylab("Density") + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 10.95, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 1) + facet_grid(TP_label~.),
Child_everything %>% filter(!is.na(Timepoint)) %>% ggplot(aes(x=PA)) + 
    geom_density(size=1) + ggtitle("CHILD") + xlab("Pantothenic Acid (uM)") + ylab("Density") + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 10.95, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", size = 1) + facet_grid(TP_label~.), nrow = 1, common.legend = TRUE) 
Figure5C

ggsave("C://Users/ETTINA03/NYU Langone Health Dropbox/April Jauhal/Shenhav_Lab/IMiC/Figures/Figure5C.pdf",
         plot = Figure5C, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 600)

# Calculate percent of mothers with levels below PA threshold per Timepoint/BEP status: 
PA_def_calc <- function(x) {return(length(x[x<9.94])/length(x))}
Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>% filter(BEP==0) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>% filter(BEP==1) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>% filter(BEP==0) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>% filter(BEP==1) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>% filter(BEP==0) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>% filter(BEP==1) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>% filter(BEP==0) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>% filter(BEP==1) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>% filter(BEP==0) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>% filter(BEP==1) %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
Child_everything %>% pull(PA) %>% PA_def_calc
```

## Figure 5D Association between C5 percentile categories and PA level
``` {r}
grid_C5_PA_A1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = PA)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal()  + ylab(NULL) +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("") + ylab("Pantothenic Acid (uM)")
grid_C5_PA_B1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = PA)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal() + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C5_PA_C1 = Misame_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==3) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (misame_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = PA)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal()  + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
      stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
  
grid_C5_PA_D1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==1) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = PA)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal()  + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
grid_C5_PA_E1 = Vital_everything %>% filter(Timepoint==2) %>%
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    left_join (vital_weight_diff_df_3m) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = PA)) + geom_boxplot(fill = C5_color) + theme_minimal()  + ylab(NULL) + theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
  
grid_C5_PA_F1 = Child_everything %>% 
    mutate(C5_percentile = cut(C5, 
                               breaks = quantile(C5, probs = 0:5 / 5, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               include.lowest = TRUE, 
                               labels = c("0-20%", "20-40%", "40-60%", "60-80%", "80-100%"))) %>%

    filter(!is.na(C5), C5_percentile %in% c("0-20%", "80-100%")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=C5_percentile, y = PA)) + geom_boxplot(fill = "grey") + theme_minimal()  + ylab(NULL) +  theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("0-20%", "80-100%")), label = "p.signif") + ggtitle("")
Figure5D = ggarrange(grid_C5_PA_A1, grid_C5_PA_B1, grid_C5_PA_C1, grid_C5_PA_D1, grid_C5_PA_E1, grid_C5_PA_F1, nrow = 1)
Figure5D

ggexport(Figure5D,
         filename=paste0(fig_path, "/Figure_5D.pdf"),
         width=9.7, height=4, dpi=300)
```
